scripts.dev:all: echo "Use 'npm run dev' in inline mode, or run worker and web in separate terminals for queue mode."
scripts.build:worker: tsc --module commonjs --rootDir src --outDir dist --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop true src/worker/statuscert-worker.ts
scripts.build:statuscert-lib: tsc --module commonjs --rootDir src --outDir dist --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop true src/lib/statuscert/docx.ts src/lib/statuscert/editor.ts src/lib/statuscert/pipeline.ts src/lib/statuscert/template_token_manifest.ts src/lib/statuscert/types.ts
scripts.test:statuscert: npm run -s build:worker && npm run -s build:statuscert-lib && node --test tests/statuscert/*.test.mjs
